 }}This article details the [[Warrington Wolves]] Rugby League Football Club's 2012 season. This is the clubs seventeenth season of the [[Super League]] era. Warrington Wolves won their eighth [[2012 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]] with a 35-18 win against [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the final.<ref>{{cite web
 |url=http://www.warringtonwolves.org/warrington-wolves-are-challenge-cup-winners-2012-5628 
 |title=Warrington Wolves Are Challenge Cup Winners 2012! 
 |date=25 August 2012 
 |work=Warrington Wolves Official Site 
 |accessdate=28 August 2012 
 |url-status=dead 
 |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20131217230118/http://www.warringtonwolves.org/warrington-wolves-are-challenge-cup-winners-2012-5628 
 |archivedate=17 December 2013 
}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugbyleague/match_report/0,,11070_3533397,00.html 
|title=Wolves win at Wembley again|date=25 August 2012|work=Sky Sports|accessdate=28 August 2012 }}</ref>
